case_title: CONNIE CHAPMAN VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAPMAN, CONNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CORPORATION CORPORATION $2,160.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.43 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,352.43, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAPMAN, CONNIE AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CORPORATION CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
